_comment: SHA-256 of the postinstall-generated assets (the files themselves are gitignored to keep the repo small). CI regenerates them from the pinned dependencies and scripts/check-vendor-hashes.mjs verifies they match, so the published bundle's generated bytes are accounted for by public source. Hashes are dependency-derived (deps pinned in pnpm-lock.yaml) and should be stable across Node versions; if check-vendor-hashes warns in CI, regenerate under the .nvmrc Node version. After a deliberate @twemoji/svg, harfbuzzjs, or svgo version bump, regenerate with `node scripts/vendor-twemoji.mjs` and update these hashes.
